HGSS.570.0000:
Hi. You must be a sightseer!
Why not take a picture here?\f
You saw the camera outside?
I put it there!\f
You may come across my relatives
here and there.\f
Anyway, go ahead and take a picture!
Check the camera, and it’ll take\r
a picture for you.\f
It’ll be a good memory of your
journey with your Pokémon!
